title: SQL: Add column...
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD COLUMN age INT;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE age IS NULL;
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD COLUMN salary DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00;
key_bug_features: Adding a column to an existing table
